latest_evidence_summary: OpenNori autogoal is implemented as a packaged Skill-driven convergence mode that outputs the standard Nori Contract Draft. The root and acceptance Skills route rough-idea/autogoal requests to nori-autogoal, the new Skill instructs agents to preserve the full idea and avoid MVP/phase/task-list downgrades, draft --brief renders assumptions and open questions in ordinary acceptance markdown, and README plus the public site explain the user-facing behavior.
